title: Tensions between the US and Iran shake markets: oil and gold fluctuate while stock markets trade mixed
summary: US airstrikes against Iran and the near-paralysis of traffic in the Strait of Hormuz increase volatility in global markets, with declines in cryptocurrencies and silver, while oil moderates amid hopes for peace and Japan warns its citizens in the Middle East.

title: SK Hynix launches its mega IPO in New York with demand 7 times higher than the offer
summary: The South Korean chipmaker offers $149 per ADR in an offering that generates record fees of $140 million for Wall Street and tests appetite for artificial intelligence.

title: Fed shows concern about inflation and majority of committee supports future rate hikes
summary: The Fed minutes reveal growing unease about inflation, although New York Fed President Williams does not foresee a sustained rebound in energy prices.

title: Semiconductor stocks surge: Micron, SanDisk and Marvell lead sector gains
summary: Chipmakers benefit from optimism over artificial intelligence, with Micron accelerating investments of more than $250 billion and Asian indexes boosted by US technology stocks.

title: Meta builds AI data center in Canada for $9 billion and launches Muse Spark 1.1 model
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's company announces massive investment in AI infrastructure in Canada, while releasing a new language model, although its shares fall after the news.

title: Sony plans to create a trust bank for stablecoins in the US as crypto regulation advances
summary: The Japanese giant enters the digital asset sector, Kraken applies for a banking license in Spain, and the British Parliament debates banning political donations in cryptocurrencies, amid bitcoin volatility.

title: Concern grows about inflation and bubble risks in financial markets
summary: Bond investors fear more persistent inflation and further rate hikes, while several indicators point to possible speculative excesses, such as unequal spending between rich and poor.

title: ECB keeps rate path open and June minutes indicate rate hike is not certain
summary: The European central bank makes clear that next moves are not predetermined, while the minutes of its June meeting show that the rate increase should not be considered definitive.

title: Weekly US jobless claims unexpectedly fall to 215,000
summary: Employment data shows a surprising reduction in unemployment benefit claims, exceeding market expectations.

title: US regulator blocks CME's 24/7 oil futures contract
summary: The CFTC prevents the accelerated approval of the oil contract that would operate 24 hours a day, according to FT reports, amid geopolitical volatility.

title: Ibex 35 rises 0.97% and triggers rebound driven by trade detente with Trump
summary: The Spanish benchmark recovers ground to 19,288 points, boosted by expectations of lower tariff tensions and a more favorable global context.

title: SpaceX raises valuation after Blue Origin news and Ark buys shares
summary: Analysts raise the valuation of Elon Musk's space company, while Ark Invest acquires stakes and there is speculation about a possible IPO that should not lead to abandoning Rocket Lab.

title: Wall Street opens mixed amid conflicting signals and watchful of global tensions
summary: The Dow Jones edges lower, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq trade slightly higher, in a day of uncertainty over geopolitical and economic factors.

title: Europe faces energy crisis with gas shortage and Russia bans diesel exports
summary: The gas shortage in Europe worsens, while Russia imposes a ban on diesel exports to contain its own domestic market, increasing pressure on energy prices.

title: European Parliament backs digital euro and EU prepares new banking rules
summary: The European Union advances in financial regulation with support for the digital euro and the revision of banking rules, while European banks explore synthetic risk transfers.

title: Retirement tips: advisor fees, Social Security and relocation
summary: Articles on hiring financial advisors, Social Security reform, and options for moving in retirement offer guidance to investors in an uncertain environment.

title: Volkswagen faces critical talks over plant closures and job cuts
summary: The German automaker's board discusses possible factory closures and staff reductions to address industry challenges.

title: US existing home sales unexpectedly fall in June due to lack of affordability
summary: The US housing market remains weak, with existing home sales declining in June due to high financing costs and prices.

title: Bond issuance to finance AI infrastructure exceeds $250 billion
summary: Investor demand for AI-related bonds reaches record levels, boosting funding for data centers and other technology infrastructure.

title: Group led by The New York Times seeks sanctions against OpenAI for copyright infringement
summary: A media consortium asks a court to sanction OpenAI for the unauthorized use of protected content in training its artificial intelligence models.
